title: SQLite not found in Docker container
symptom: When trying to access the SQLite database inside the n8n Docker container, the user receives an error indicating that sqlite3 is not found.
applies_when: Using SQLite in an Alpine Linux Docker container
not_this_if: Using a different database management tool
root_cause: The error occurs because the SQLite command-line tool is not installed in the Alpine Linux environment by default. This prevents users from accessing the SQLite database to perform necessary operations.
fix_steps: Install SQLite temporarily in the container using: apk add sqlite
Run the SQLite command to access the database: sqlite3 /home/node/.n8n/database.sqlite
agent_instruction: Install SQLite in the Docker container to access the database.
